topic: Scientists discover a surprising way to quiet the anxious mi.

framework.structure: ['The reason you'] + [Universal Relatable Behaviour] + ['is not'] + [Assumed Reason] + ['it is'] + [Dark Mechanism]
framework.trigger: Self-revelation — reframes a familiar experience with a disturbing explanation
framework.example: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engineered by behavioural scientists.

script.hook: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engineered by behavioural scientists.
script.body: This psychological mechanism gives an unfair advantage in every conversation.
script.cta: Drop a 👁️ if you made it this far.

full_script_text: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engineered by behavioural scientists. <break time="0.8s"/> This psychological mechanism gives an unfair advantage in every conversation. Drop a 👁️ if you made it this far.

visual_direction.kling_prompt: extreme close-up eyes in deep shadow, single side light source, no full faces, 9:16 vertical cinematic, psychological thriller, deep shadows

caption_text: The reason you can't stop scrolling is not boredom. It is a dopamine loop engine
